'''wangate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:icosahedrally|icosahedrally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ng-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:icosahedrally|icosahedrally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wangate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:wangate|wangate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wangatesher|wangatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wangatesherĂ«m|wangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wangatero|wangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wangateshĂ«|wangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wangateshĂ«m|wangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwangatero|gokiwangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwangateshĂ«|gokiwangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwangateshĂ«m|gokiwangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowangankerom|gowangankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowangankeshĂ«|gowangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowangankeshĂ«m|gowangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowangankeya|gowangankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wangaterom|wangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wangatemu|wangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wangateya|wangateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwangaterom|gokiwangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwangatemu|gokiwangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwangateya|gokiwangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:wangangate|wangangate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wangangatesher|wangangatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wangangatesherĂ«m|wangangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wangangatero|wangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wangangateshĂ«|wangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wangangateshĂ«m|wangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwangangatero|gokiwangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwangangateshĂ«|gokiwangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwangangateshĂ«m|gokiwangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowangangankerom|gowangangankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowangangankeshĂ«|gowangangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowangangankeshĂ«m|gowangangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowangangankeya|gowangangankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wangangaterom|wangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wangangatemu|wangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wangangateya|wangangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwangangaterom|gokiwangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwangangatemu|gokiwangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwangangateya|gokiwangangateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:wĂŠngĂŠte|wĂŠngĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wĂŠngĂŠtesher|wĂŠngĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m|wĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠngĂŠtero|wĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|wĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|wĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠngĂŠtero|gokiwĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|gokiwĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiwĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowĂŠngĂŠnkerom|gowĂŠngĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«|gowĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gowĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowĂŠngĂŠnkeya|gowĂŠngĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠngĂŠterom|wĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠngĂŠtemu|wĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wĂŠngĂŠteya|wĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠngĂŠterom|gokiwĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠngĂŠtemu|gokiwĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠngĂŠteya|gokiwĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafngafte|wafngafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wafngaftesher|wafngaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafngaftesherĂ«m|wafngaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafngaftero|wafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafngafteshĂ«|wafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafngafteshĂ«m|wafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafngaftero|gokiwafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafngafteshĂ«|gokiwafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafngafteshĂ«m|gokiwafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowafngafnkerom|gowafngafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafngafnkeshĂ«|gowafngafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafngafnkeshĂ«m|gowafngafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowafngafnkeya|gowafngafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafngafterom|wafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafngaftemu|wafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wafngafteya|wafngafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafngafterom|gokiwafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafngaftemu|gokiwafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwafngafteya|gokiwafngafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
